questionHtml: The heart responds quickly to physical activity. Describe how heart rate is controlled to meet the increased circulatory demands.
markschemeHtml:
a. nerve impulse from medulla/brain acts on heart/right atrium ✔

b. pacemaker/sinoatrial node/SAN increases/controls contraction of heart ✔

c. epinephrine/adrenaline «rapidly» increases heart rate ✔

meta.title: The heart responds quickly to physical activity. Describe how heart rate is controlled to meet the increased circulatory demands.
